zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Countess of Eberstein於大約1185年出生在巴登阿赤 巴登巴登-巴登-波斯坦時，她的父親Eberhard II von Eberstein63歲，母親Adelheid von Sayn61歲。她於大約1205年與Friedrich I von Saarbrücken在海因里希_結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年3月1日享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Countess of Eberstein于大约1185年出生在巴登阿赤 巴登巴登-巴登-波斯坦时，她的父亲Eberhard II von Eberstein63岁，母亲Adelheid von Sayn61岁。她于大约1205年与Friedrich I von Saarbrücken在海因里希_结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年3月1日享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eberstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German ober ‘upper’ + stein ‘rock, stone’, also ‘castle’, hence a habitational or topographic name from the place Idar-Oberstein in Rhineland-Palatinate with the latter part of the name taken from a rock above the town.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Countess of Eberstein was born about 1185, in Neu-Eberstein, Baden-Baden, Amt Baden, Baden, her father, Eberhard II von Eberstein, was 63 and her mother, Adelheid von Sayn, was 61. She married Friedrich I von Saarbrücken about 1205, in Prussia. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 1 March 1263, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Countess of Eberstein est née environ 1185, à Neu-Eberstein, Baden-Baden, Amt Baden, Baden, son père, Eberhard II von Eberstein, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Sayn, avait 61 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich I von Saarbrücken environ 1205, à Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 mars 1263, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Countess of Eberstein um 1185 in Neu-Eberstein, Baden-Baden, Amt Baden, Baden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eberhard II von Eberstein 63 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Sayn 61. Sie hat um 1205 in Preußen Friedrich I von Saarbrücken geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. März 1263 im Alter von 79 Jahren.

Lei sposato Friedrich I von Saarbrücken circa 1205, nel Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 marzo 1263, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Countess of Eberstein(이)가 대략 1185년 바든 아트 바든 바데-바든 니우-버스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eberhard II von Eberstein(은)는 63세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Sayn(은)는 61세였다. 그녀는 대략 1205년 프레우ss에서 Friedrich I von Saarbrücken(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 3월 1일 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Countess of Eberstein родилась около 1185 г. в местности неу-ебирстин, баден-баден, амт баден, баден, её отцу по имени Eberhard II von Eberstein было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Sayn, 61. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich I von Saarbrücken около 1205 г. в местности Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 марта 1263 г. в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Friedrich I von Saarbrücken aproximadamente 1205, en Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1263, a la edad de 79 años.
